headline: Is Pfizer Inc. (PFE) Expanding Its Cancer Pipeline Through a Landmark Innovent Partnership?
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 11 Most Undervalued Pharma Stocks to Invest In. Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is one of the most undervalued stocks on this list. TheFly reported on May 27 that PFE and Innovent Biologics announced a global strategic licensing and collaboration agreement covering the research and development of 12 early-stage oncology programs, including […]

headline: Why Pfizer’s Current Price May Be Too Cheap to Ignore
summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) is one of those names where the headline narrative (COVID hangover, patent cliff) keeps overshadowing what is actually a defensive cash machine trading at a single-digit forward multiple. After running the numbers, my view leans constructive, and the 24/7 Wall St. price target reflects that. PFE stock trades at $26.18, and our 24/7 ... headline: C4 Therapeutics "Buy" On Cemsidomide Advancement And Competitor's Positive Readout
